case_title: TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS SANCHEZ,ALEJANDRO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $179.63 FILED BY TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ,ALEJANDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
